recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-41276 (CVSS 8.1) in Flowise AccountService resetPassword lets unauthenticated attackers bypass authentication. ZDI advisory warns no auth required.
ZDI disclosed CVE-2026-24032, a 7.3-CVSS authentication bypass in Siemens SINEC NMS that requires no authentication to exploit. Affects industrial network management systems.

A critical authentication bypass flaw in etcd, CVE-2026-33413 (CVSS 8.8), allows unauthorized access to sensitive cluster APIs, potentially exposing secrets and configurations in Kubernetes and cloud-
